hero.title: Healthcare, Choreographed for Your Home
hero.subtitle: Clinical precision meets the comfort of home. Organized medical care, delivered where life happens.

services.title: Organized Clinical Lanes
services.doctorDesc: Bedside evaluations and expert medical guidance.
services.nurseDesc: Professional clinical support with empathy and precision.
services.labDesc: Hospital-grade diagnostics in your private environment.
services.radiologyDesc: Advanced high-resolution imaging brought directly to you.

booking.title: Book a Service Now
booking.subtitle: No registration required
booking.successMessage: Your request ID is: {id}. Our team will contact you shortly.
booking.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
booking.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters

howItWorks.title: Clarity in Motion
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select your care path and detailing your requirements within our secure interface.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We orchestrate the clinical logistics, matching you with the right expertise.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Experience seamless care followed by comprehensive digital health records.

cta.title: Reclaim Your Peace of Mind
cta.subtitle: Establish a secure account to centralize your medical narrative and orchestrate future care.

auth.title: Welcome Back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage your healthcare requests
auth.registerSubtitle: Join Curevie and manage your services easily

requestDetail.title: Request #{id}
requestDetail.timelineSubtitle: Follow your request step by step with a clearer story of what is happening now and what comes next.
requestDetail.timelineStagePending: This stage will unlock automatically when your request moves forward.
requestDetail.timelineJourneyDoneDescription: The request finished its full journey and your final report is available.
requestDetail.timelineEmpty: Every new action on your request appears here in order.

timelineHints.received: We logged your request and prepared it for review.
timelineHints.assigned: A provider has been matched and the visit is being organized.
timelineHints.inProgress: The provider is actively working on your request.
timelineHints.completed: The service is done and the clinical notes are being finalized.
timelineHints.closed: Your request is fully closed and the final report is ready.

timelineEvents.updateDescription: A new activity was recorded on your request.
timelineEvents.packageTasksGeneratedDescription: The system generated the package workflow so the medical team can start coordinating service details.
timelineEvents.taskAssignedDescription: A provider has been attached to your request and can continue the next step.
timelineEvents.taskAcceptedDescription: Your assigned provider accepted the task and is ready to proceed.
timelineEvents.taskSubmittedDescription: One of the request tasks was submitted with status {status}.
timelineEvents.statusAssignedDescription: Your request has moved from waiting to an assigned provider stage.
timelineEvents.statusInProgressDescription: The visit has started and direct coordination is now active.
timelineEvents.statusCompletedDescription: The provider finished the request and the final review is underway.
timelineEvents.statusClosedDescription: The request was closed and your final report is ready to review.
timelineEvents.paymentRecordedDescription: A payment entry was added to this request and is waiting for confirmation if needed.
timelineEvents.paymentApprovedDescription: Your payment record has been reviewed and approved.
timelineEvents.finalReportUpdatedDescription: The final report was updated and is now {status}.
timelineEvents.subReportUpdatedDescription: A provider updated a supporting report and marked it as {status}.
timelineEvents.finalReportApprovedDescription: Admin approved the final report and moved the request closer to closure.
timelineEvents.finalReportConfirmedTitle: Lead doctor confirmed the final report
timelineEvents.finalReportConfirmedDescription: The lead doctor completed the medical confirmation for your final report.
timelineEvents.chatFromYouDescription: You sent a new message in {room}.
timelineEvents.chatFromProviderDescription: Your provider added a new message in {room}.
timelineEvents.chatGenericDescription: A new message was added in {room}.
timelineEvents.orderAddedDescription: The care team added a new order so the request can move through the required medical steps.
timelineEvents.workflowAdvancedDescription: Your request moved into the {stage} stage for the next internal step.
timelineEvents.requestClosedDescription: Admin closed the request and published the final report package.
timelineEvents.publishedDescription: Your final report was published and is ready to download.

status.pendingDescription: Your request has been received and is waiting for review.
status.acceptedDescription: Your request has been accepted and scheduling is in progress.
status.assignedDescription: A provider has been assigned and will contact you if needed.
status.inProgressDescription: Your care team is currently working on the request.
status.completedDescription: The service is complete and the final report is being prepared.
status.closedDescription: Your final report is available now.
status.cancelledDescription: This request has been cancelled. Contact support if you need help.

requestDetail.reportPendingDescription: Your report will appear here after the request is closed.
requestDetail.reportReadyDescription: You can review the report details and download the PDF.
requestDetail.reportHidden: The report details will appear here once the request is closed.
requestDetail.chatSubtitle: Your assigned provider can message you here once the request starts.
requestDetail.chatNotAvailableYet: Chat will be available when the service starts
requestDetail.chatMessageHint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
requestDetail.chatLocationNotSupported: Location sharing is not supported in this browser
requestDetail.invoiceHiddenDescription: Billing details will appear once the invoice is approved for patient view.
requestDetail.packageHeroDescriptionFallback: This package groups multiple care steps into one coordinated request for the medical team.
requestDetail.packageSummaryDescription: Here is everything included in this package so you can understand the visit clearly before it starts.
requestDetail.packageReadyForCareDescription: All package steps stay linked under one request so your care journey remains organized.
requestDetail.packageIncludedServicesDescription: Consultations, procedures, and imaging already attached to this package.
requestDetail.noPackageServices: No medical or imaging services are linked to this package.
requestDetail.packageIncludedLabTestsDescription: Lab tests that are already part of this package.
requestDetail.noPackageLabTests: No lab tests are linked to this package.

chatPage.adminOnlyDescription: Follow both admin conversations and request rooms with providers in one place.
chatPage.inboxDescription: The admin conversation stays first, followed by open request rooms and then closed ones by latest activity.
chatPage.generalChatDescription: This inbox is separate from request-based provider chats.
chatPage.selectAdminHint: Choose or start an admin conversation to continue.
chatPage.requestRoomsDescription: Past and active provider conversations stay linked to their own requests.
chatPage.selectThreadHint: Choose an admin conversation or a request room to continue.
chatPage.requestThreadDescription: Provider conversation linked to this request.
chatPage.requestClosedNotice: This room is closed because the request has been completed.
chatPage.emptyMessage: Message body or attachment is required
chatPage.chatLocationNotSupported: Location not supported on this device
chatPage.chatLocationAccuracyTooLow: Location accuracy is too low ({meters} m). Move closer to a window or enable GPS, then try again.
chatPage.chatLocationLowAccuracy: Shared but accuracy is low ({meters} m) — try from mobile

dashboardPage.pendingInvoicesSummary: You have {count} pending invoice(s). Total due: {amount} JD

requestsPage.summaryDescription: Track every care request from one place, see what still needs attention, and jump directly into the next action.
requestsPage.totalRequestsHint: All requests created under your account.
requestsPage.activeRequestsHint: Requests that are still moving through care steps.
requestsPage.readyReportsHint: Closed requests with a published final report.
requestsPage.awaitingProviderHint: Requests still waiting for provider assignment.
requestsPage.filtersDescription: Filter your requests by the current stage to reach the right status faster.
requestsPage.cardDefaultDescription: This request is currently marked as {status}.
requestsPage.currentRequestsDescription: These requests are still active and may need your follow-up soon.
requestsPage.archivedRequestsDescription: Finished requests, published reports, and closed care history.
requestsPage.noFilteredRequestsDescription: Try a different filter or switch back to viewing all requests.
requestsPage.emptyDescription: Once you submit your first request, it will appear here with its latest status, provider, and next step.
requestsPage.loadError: We could not load your requests right now.

REQUEST_ASSIGNED.body: A provider has been assigned to your request and will contact you if needed.

REQUEST_COMPLETED.title: Request completed
REQUEST_COMPLETED.body: Your request has been completed successfully.

PAYMENT_PARTIAL.title: Payment received

INVOICE_PAID.title: Invoice paid in full

POINTS_EARNED.title: Points earned
POINTS_EARNED.body: You earned {points} points. Current balance: {totalPoints} points.

REPORT_PUBLISHED.title: Medical report ready
REPORT_PUBLISHED.body: Your medical report has been reviewed and is now available.

hero.eyebrow: Premium home healthcare, choreographed end to end
hero.copy: Curevie orchestrates the fragmented layers of home healthcare into a single, seamless narrative. From selection to digital closure, we ensure every clinical step is visible, coordinated, and calm.

metrics.catalogCopy: A curated range of services and programs optimized for home delivery.
metrics.streamsCopy: Physician visits, precision diagnostics, and grouped care programs.
metrics.followupCopy: Every clinical journey concludes with a comprehensive digital history.

board.title: Every service line, one coordinated entry point.

signal.title: A care journey that speaks your language
signal.copy: Instead of navigating a black box, every request moves through transparent stages that respect your time and your health.

points.1: A singular, unified request path for complex care journeys.
points.2: Clinical architecture designed specifically for the home environment.
points.3: Guaranteed digital documentation for every completed action.

categories.title: Select the care path that matches your needs.
categories.copy: Healthcare should not be a puzzle. We have organized our expertise into distinct lanes, ensuring your journey starts with the correct medical context and moves without noise.

medicalVisits.title: Medical Visits
medicalVisits.summary: Expert clinical evaluations and hands-on care visits for patients requiring direct medical attention in their own space.
medicalVisits.routeLabel: Physician and nursing expertise joined in a single path

imaging.title: Radiology
imaging.summary: Advanced portable radiology that brings high-resolution diagnostic power directly to the patient's bedside.
imaging.routeLabel: Diagnostic imaging with a dedicated, coordinated catalog

labDiagnostics.title: Lab Diagnostics
labDiagnostics.summary: Structured laboratory services optimized for home collection with seamless digital reporting.
labDiagnostics.routeLabel: Direct access to laboratory diagnostics in a clean interface

carePrograms.title: Care Programs
carePrograms.summary: Comprehensive programs that group multiple services into a single, coordinated clinical journey.
carePrograms.routeLabel: Integrated programs built for complex care coordination

workflow.title: From intake to digital resolution, with absolute visibility.
workflow.copy: We absorb the operational complexity behind the scenes, leaving you with a clean, predictable narrative from start to finish.
workflow.assuranceCopy: Every phase has a clinical purpose: intake, coordination, execution, and documented closure.

step1.title: Enter through the correct clinical lane.
step1.copy: Instead of a generic form, you start with the right medical context, ensuring your needs are captured accurately from the first click.
step1.proof: Clarity begins here: the right lane ensures the right resources are assigned immediately.

step2.title: Curevie orchestrates the clinical logistics.
step2.copy: Our system translates your request into an organized path, matching you with the correct provider and diagnostic sequence without noise.
step2.proof: Operational complexity stays in the system. You see a calm, guided trajectory.

step3.title: Care that honors your environment.
step3.copy: Visits, imaging, or diagnostics are dispatched to your home, removing the friction of travel and keeping your focus on recovery.
step3.proof: The healthcare system moves toward you, respecting your space and time.

step4.title: Conclusion with a digital narrative.
step4.copy: Every journey ends with a visible result: your full request history, transparent billing, and clinical reports available instantly.
step4.proof: Closure is documented and reviewable, ensuring you remain in control of your records.

guestRequest.title: Confirm a guest request
guestRequest.description: Fill the guest details below and Curevie will create this request directly from the {category} catalog without sending you into the dashboard flow.
guestRequest.serviceHint: Select the exact option you want to dispatch from this category before confirming the request.
guestRequest.footerNote: After confirmation, the request is submitted as a guest request using the name, phone number, and address entered above.
guestRequest.error: We could not create this guest request right now. Please try again.

stats.searchReadyCopy: Only the relevant services for this line appear here, which keeps scanning fast.
stats.requestPathCopy: Every option here leads into the correct request setup instead of a generic form.

catalog.title: Browse the available options in this category.
catalog.copy: Search within the category, compare what fits the patient, then move into the right request flow directly from the card.

error.title: We could not load this service line right now.
error.copy: Try again in a moment. If the issue continues, the public API may be temporarily unavailable.

empty.title: No items match this search yet.
empty.copy: Try a broader keyword or return later when the catalog has more available options.

labels.defaultDescription: This option is structured for a guided home-care request through the Curevie system.

bottomBand.title: Select your care path and enter the coordinated request flow.
bottomBand.copy: This experience is designed for complete focus: one clinical lane, one catalog, and a clear path to resolution.

medicalVisits.title: Medical Visits
medicalVisits.subtitle: A focused catalog for physician-led visits and specialized bedside care.
medicalVisits.story: This lane ensures high-touch clinical care: consultation, expert assessment, and immediate intervention, all within your space.

imaging.title: Radiology
imaging.subtitle: High-resolution imaging that remains close to the patient, delivered via a specialized request path.
imaging.story: This lane is built for speed and precision: portable imaging coordinated accurately with your clinical needs.

labDiagnostics.title: Lab Diagnostics
labDiagnostics.subtitle: Comprehensive laboratory tests prepared for precise home collection and digital record integration.
labDiagnostics.story: We simplify diagnostic monitoring: select your test, follow the guided path, and receive a refined digital result.

carePrograms.title: Care Programs
carePrograms.subtitle: Bundled solutions that group multiple clinical steps into one seamless, guided experience.
carePrograms.story: For more complex journeys, this lane provides a single orchestration point for diverse clinical requirements.

footer.title: A conclusion with the same clarity our care paths promise.
footer.copy: Move into a focused clinical lane or connect with our coordination desk to start your journey without the friction of traditional booking systems.
footer.description: A refined platform for home healthcare, bringing clinical excellence directly to you.
footer.contactCardCopy: Active daily for request orchestration, service guidance, and clinical follow-up.
footer.responseValue: Professional guidance for care paths and new request setup
footer.trustPoint1: A single, transparent narrative from intake to closure.
footer.trustPoint2: Specialized catalogs filtered by clinical intent.
footer.trustPoint3: Comprehensive digital records for every care milestone.
footer.bottomNote: Home-first care. Coordinated paths. Digital resolution.

hero.copy: Curevie exists to solve the fragmentation inherent in modern healthcare. We believe clinical excellence deserves an operating model that prioritizes patient visibility, precise coordination, and documented results.
hero.railTitle: Built to keep healthcare readable for the human at its center.
hero.railCopy: The patient should feel direction, not operational noise. Our platform absorbs the clinical complexity behind the scenes, leaving a clean, guided narrative in front of you.

homeFirst.title: Home-first execution
homeFirst.copy: We design our services around what can be delivered safely and accurately within the home environment.

singlePath.title: A singular care journey
singlePath.copy: Complex care can pass through multiple steps without ever becoming fragmented or confusing for the patient.

documented.title: Documented outcomes
documented.copy: Every journey ends with a visible result, ensuring your medical history remains coherent and reviewable.

pillars.title: Three principles that define our product.
pillars.copy: These are not slogans; they are the rules that define how Curevie routes requests and turns healthcare into something you can follow.
pillars.boardCopy: Clinical quality is the foundation, but the patient experience relies on structure, timing, and logical next steps.

clarity.title: The patient must understand the path.
clarity.copy: Every service lane explains itself instantly, guiding you toward the correct request shape and reducing uncertainty.
clarity.proof: Structured service pages and live request states eliminate ambiguity from the start.

coordination.title: Complexity remains inside the workflow.
coordination.copy: You shouldn't need to navigate internal logistics or sequencing. We orchestrate the path while you focus on care.
coordination.proof: The platform handles the clinical orchestration silently, presenting only a calm and guided journey.

closure.title: The final state is documented, never implied.
closure.copy: When care ends, you leave with a visible result and a digital record that honors your long-term health narrative.
closure.proof: Comprehensive reports and request histories make the conclusion of care legible and accountable.

architecture.title: How the platform manages your health journey.
architecture.copy: To the patient, the experience remains calm and guided. Beneath that, the platform is routing and coordinating to ensure clinical precision at every interval.
architecture.boardCopy: Under Every request, Curevie aligns the clinical lane, the operational sequence, and the digital outcome into one coherent story.

lane.title: Starting with the correct medical frame.
lane.copy: You never start from an empty form. The clinical lane itself determines the intent and shapes the request accurately from the first interaction.
lane.proof: Context-aware entry points remove the guesswork before the care even begins.

coordination.title: Translating choice into a clinical path.
coordination.copy: Once initiated, Curevie coordinates the internal path required for specialized providers and diagnostic steps without cluttering your experience.
coordination.proof: You follow one visible request while the system manages the deeper logic of your care.

outcome.title: Concluding with clarity and record.
outcome.copy: Closure must be visible. Every request ends with a digital result or recorded next step that resides in your permanent health profile.
outcome.proof: The final clinical state is designed to be reviewable, ensuring nothing is lost in transition.

signature.title: A care experience that feels deliberate.
signature.copy: Professional healthcare is more than quality; it is the design of trust and a journey that stays understandable from intake to resolution.
signature.quote: Curevie is designed so you see the direction, not the noise.

hero.copy: If you are deciding between services or following up on clinical progress, this page is designed to bring you to the right expertise quickly and clearly.
hero.panelTitle: We respond with direction, not generic noise.
hero.panelCopy: Our goal is not to keep you in an inbox, but to move your question into the right operational lane as quickly as possible.

guidance.title: Clinical Guidance
guidance.copy: We help you identify the correct care path before the journey becomes complex.

followUp.title: Progress Follow-up
followUp.copy: Clarify active requests instantly, ensuring you remain certain about the next clinical step.

routing.title: Operational Precision
routing.copy: Every inquiry is routed to the specialized team equipped to handle it, avoiding dead ends.

workspace.title: Inquire once. We route accurately.
workspace.copy: Use our message form when your request needs context and a structured reply. For immediate needs, our direct channels remain open.

form.title: Send a Structured Inquiry
form.copy: Detail your requirements, and we will route your message to the appropriate clinical or coordination path.

message.label: Detailed inquiry
message.placeholder: Describe your question, request, or clinical follow-up

form.assurance: Your inquiry is managed within Curevie's secure coordination and care routing system.

coverage.title: Care Outlook
coverage.copy: Our model is built for those who require precision healthcare delivered at home, with a clean path and reviewable digital resolution.

publicContact.validationError: Please complete the required fields to ensure accurate routing.
publicContact.success: Inquiry received and queued for coordination.
publicContact.error: We couldn't send your inquiry right now. Please try again.

consent.banner_description: We use necessary cookies to make our site work. With your consent we also use analytics and marketing cookies.
consent.necessary_description: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
consent.analytics_description: Anonymous usage data to help us improve the site.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

first.text: The service was exceptional. The physician arrived quickly and handled the evaluation with high professional standards.
first.name: Ahmad K.

second.text: The coordination was seamless. Having a nurse visit at home saved me significant time and hospital stress.
second.name: Sara M.

third.text: The diagnostic collection was quiet and professional. I received my digital report ahead of schedule.
third.name: Lina A.

reportsPage.title: Clinical Archives
reportsPage.description: Smart orchestration for physician reports, laboratory results, and imaging with an integrated clinical history.
reportsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by clinical path, doctor, or diagnostic
reportsPage.searchHint: Select a category to review your digital records without the friction of separate PDF management.
reportsPage.emptyFiltered: No records match this specific filter.
reportsPage.loadError: Unable to synchronize your clinical archives right now.
reportsPage.noDoctorData: No detailed narrative is currently available for this request.
reportsPage.noLabData: No diagnostic results are linked to this record.
reportsPage.noImagingData: No imaging findings are associated with this request.

validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phoneMin: Phone number must meet international standards
